product.name: ArDolu
product.familyDescriptorPl: Laminaty 3-warstwowe z membraną TPU — wodoodporne, oddychające
product.categorySourceGroup: 3 Layer (woven fabric + TPU Membrane + knit Fabric) laminated fabrics.
product.specLine: 210 g/m², 95% Polyester 5% Elastane, 3 layer laminated, Bonded Fabric
descriptions: ArDolu is 95% polyester 5% pu bonded fabric. The top layer is woven fabric, the middle layer is breathable tpu membrane, and the last layer is knit fabric.
The basic usage is for winter parka and raincoats.
ArDolu is certified for EN 343 and EN 20471
210 g/m², 95% Polyester 5% Elastane, 3 layer laminated, Bonded Fabric
technicalParameters: Tensile Strength | Warp > 1000N ; Weft > 800N | EN ISO 13934-1
Tear Strength | Warp > 40N ; Weft > 35N | EN ISO 13937-2
Dimensional Change | -3% < Length < +3% ; -3% < Width < +3% | EN ISO 5077
Dry Cleaning Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 D01
Hot Press Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 X11
Azo Test | No Azo Colorants. | EN ISO 14362-1
applicationImageLabels: High visible orange rain jackets back

evidence: applicationImageLabels: High visible orange rain jackets, High visible yellow rain jackets
matches.rationale: Explicit EN ISO 20471 certification and 'High Visible' rating, plus image labels showing high-visibility rain jackets, directly support high-visibility apparel classification.

possibleButNotAccepted.reason: Rainwear could be worn in transport/roadwork contexts but no explicit vehicle, transit-worker, or transport-sector use is stated in the product data.
